## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss client updates and upcoming tasks across multiple projects.](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several clients (Lovable, Rimkus, Otto) are in early stages, awaiting feedback or scheduling deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [HockeyStack requires immediate content production; new keyword research and assignments are being prepared](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Udemy is transitioning to a new team member (Katya), with recent progress on aligning stakeholders and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Multiple clients (Deepgram, Understory, Ambient AI) are in various stages of content review and production](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
